metric_notes.claim_label_accuracy: compares gold label with a heuristic predicted label proxy from citation overlap + text match
metric_notes.irrelevant_citation_rate: predicted citations exist but no overlap with gold citations
metric_notes.overclaim_rate: predicted citation set includes non-gold citations
metric_notes.exception_omission_rate: gold requires exception but predicted claim lacks exception marker
metric_notes.temporal_mismatch_rate: gold temporal-sensitive but predicted claim lacks explicit time marker
metric_notes.multi_authority_mismatch_rate: gold requires multi-authority but predicted claim has <2 citations
metric_notes.refusal_violation_count: prediction refused where answer_policy does not allow refusal
